description: Enum-subset refinement — dead arm (§53.15). @role is typed Role oneOf([.Admin, .Editor]), so its value can only ever be .Admin or .Editor. A match arm for .Guest names a variant EXCLUDED by the subset — the arm can never match (dead code), so E-MATCH-SUBSET-DEAD-ARM fires (the §34 error partition). Distinct from E-TYPE-023 (a duplicate arm names the same variant twice); a dead subset arm names an excluded variant once.
rationale: §53.15 when the matched value's declared type is an enum-subset refinement (oneOf([...])), the variant set narrows to the subset; a concrete arm naming an excluded variant is dead -> E-MATCH-SUBSET-DEAD-ARM.
